ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR PREFERENCE AND EXTENDING DISCOVERY CUT-OFF

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PREFERENCE IS GRANTED PER CCP 36(A) AND (D) CONDITIONED ON PLAINTIFF'S AGREEMENT THAT SUMMARY MOTIONS MAY BE HEARD ON 15 DAYS NOTICE WITHOUT AN ADDITIONAL TWO DAYS FOR E-SERVICE. TRIAL IS APRIL 2, 2012 AT 11:15AM IN DEPARTMENT 503. LAST DAY FOR HEARING SUMMARY MOTIONS IS MARCH 28, WITH OPPOSITIONS DUE 5 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING AND REPLIES DUE 2 COURT DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. PLAINTIFF TO MAKE A SETTLEMENT DEMAND ON ALL DEFENDANTS NO LATER THAN MARCH 9, 2012. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IN ROOM 603 AT 1:30PM ON MARCH 28, 2012. TIME TO RESPOND TO WRITTEN CONTENTION DISCOVERY IS SHORTENED TO 15 DAYS. FACT DISCOVERY CUT-OFF DATE IS APRIL 2, 2012. EXPERT DISCOVERY REMAINS OPEN UNTIL THE CASE IS ASSIGNED TO A TRIAL DEPARTMENT. NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 17, 2012, PLAINTIFF MUST PROVIDE A STATEMENT STATING, AS TO EACH DEFENDANT, THE NAME AND CONTACT INFORMATION OF EACH PERSON WITH KNOWLEDGE OF ANY FACTS SUPPORTING ANY OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS. NO LATER THAN FEBRUARY 17, 2012, DEFENDANTS MUST PROVIDE A STATEMENT STATING THE NAME AND CONTACT INFORMATION OF EACH PERSON WITH KNOWLEDGE OF ANY FACTS SUPPORTING ANY OF DEFENDANT'S AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES. ANY PERSON NOT IDENTIFIED ON THE STATEMENTS WILL BE BARRED FROM TESTIFYING AT TRIAL OR PRESENTING A DECLARATION ON A SUMMARY MOTION ABSENT GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. THE PARTIES TO MEET AND CONFER REGARDING ANY OTHER SCHEDULING OR OTHER ISSUE WHICH ANY OF THEM WANT TO HAVE INCLUDED IN THE PREFERENCE ORDER. FURTHER CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON MARCH 7, 2012 AT 1:30PM. NO NEED FOR ANY PARTY TO FILE ANY CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE STATEMENT. PARTIES MAY APPEAR AT THE CONFERENCE BY TELEPHONE. NO OPPOSITIONS TO THE MOTION WERE FILED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON, REPORTER: JENNIFER SEELENBACHER, CSR #11878 (503/TLJ)
